scope_note: This v0.7 addition builds a NEW gold-standard deep-dive pair dossier for solar_strong_wind (utility-scale ground-mount PV under straight-line / severe-convective wind: derecho, microburst, gust-front outflow). Tornado and hurricane/TC are named-and-quarantined. The canonical crosswalk is RESOLVED against the PROMOTED strong_wind_solar v1.0 cell in Damage_Modeling; a separate, clearly-labeled PROPOSED / NON-CANONICAL two-architecture v2.0 preview accompanies it and does NOT alter or supersede the canonical crosswalk.
golden_rule_on_grain: A source with a wind loss number is NOT a benchmark until its sub-peril frame (straight-line vs hail vs tornado vs hurricane), denominator, coverage, asset class, geography, and loss basis are understood. Central finding: NO open public source isolates pure straight-line / convective-wind $ severity for utility-scale solar -- every open dollar figure is hail-stow-framed (AXIS), hail-dominant (GCube), tornado-parametric (Descartes), generic all-property SCS (Gallagher Re/Aon/Swiss Re), or gated (Verisk/AIR, Moody's RMS, VDE/Cirrus, Renew Risk).

upstream_cell_governance.curve_form_v1: thresholded_logistic_demand: DR = max_DR/(1+exp(-k*(R_eff-R50))) for R_eff>=R0 else 0

v2_0_candidate.architecture: single straight_line_convective input routed by array_architecture into two pathways
v2_0_candidate.curve_form_v2: ordered_damage_state_lognormal (beta_ln~0.3, zero_below~0.1); lower/central/upper state medians are an EPISTEMIC ENVELOPE, NOT percentiles

hazard_axes_v2.fixed_tilt_ground_mount_screening_v1: x_fixed = event net-pressure demand / qualified design net-pressure (proxy (gust/design_gust)^2)

v2_0_candidate.note: fixed_tilt and single_axis_tracker use DIFFERENT denominators; never cross-regress the two pathways or either against the v1.0 R_eff axis

blank_cell_examples: benchmark_number_matrix.csv: AXIS $342M gross-claim row has usd_per_MWdc BLANK (no MW denominator), not zero
benchmark_number_matrix.csv: Oakey (~2000 modules @ 55 MW) and Soltec (~1-2% collapse) fraction rows have usd_per_MWdc BLANK (no $)
damage_curve_intensity_reference.csv: SWS_SCADA_EXPOSED excluded from the primary structural aggregate (secondary unit)
damage_curve_intensity_reference_v2_proposed.csv: rows above the tracker Ucrit / fixed design net-pressure valid range carry extrapolation_flag and blank DR
checks.mounting_alternatives_not_additive_note: SWS_TRACKER_STRUCT and SWS_RACKING_STRUCT are ALTERNATIVE architectures; a single-architecture plant is tracker OR fixed-tilt, never the sum. Module-attach (0.40) dominates wind-exposed value on both.
checks.tiv_cross_check_detail: NREL/DOE Q1-2024 utility-scale MMP $1.12/W-dc == $1,120,000/MWdc installed TIV base (exact)
checks.wind_convective_wind_refresh_type: cross-link and CHANGELOG mention only; DM wind_tornado_wind cell UNCHANGED since v0.6 so NO re-research and NO artifact changes

notes: solar_strong_wind is a NEW gold-standard pair dossier matching/exceeding the solar_hail depth: 29 catalogued sources, 30 benchmark rows, a full source coverage matrix (29 x 17), a canonical RESOLVED value/damage crosswalk against the PROMOTED strong_wind_solar v1.0 cell, and a clearly-labeled PROPOSED / NON-CANONICAL two-architecture v2.0 preview.

The canonical crosswalk is Case A (RESOLVED_FROM_DAMAGE_MODELING) -- the strong_wind_solar cell exists and is promoted (canonical_runtime_artifact=true), so the 5 SWS_* failure units, their value shares, and the thresholded-logistic demand->DR ordinates are copied verbatim. It is never PENDING.

The v2.0 preview mirrors an upstream artifact whose canonical_runtime_artifact=false and promotion=not_performed. It is a two-architecture screening candidate (fixed_tilt net-pressure pathway + single_axis_tracker gust/Ucrit pathway) with lower/central/upper state medians that are an EPISTEMIC ENVELOPE, not statistical percentiles. It does NOT alter the canonical crosswalk.

Central finding: no open public source isolates pure straight-line / convective-wind $ severity for utility-scale solar. Strongest OPEN evidence is engineering/screening grade (AXIS stow $/MW swing $150k-$380k; CPP galloping onset <~40 m/s; PVEL tracker 1800 Pa vs fixed 2400 Pa; NEXTracker 25-yr failure probability; Cedar Rapids 2020 derecho forensics). The $1,120,000/MWdc TIV base is EXACT-confirmed by NREL/DOE Q1-2024 ($1.12/W-dc).

wind_convective_wind was NOT re-researched: the upstream Damage_Modeling wind_tornado_wind cell is byte-unchanged since v0.6, so this refresh is limited to version cross-links and a CHANGELOG mention. Its v0.5 RESOLVED and v0.6 v2-preview files are untouched.

Row counts above equal the actual data-row counts of the new solar_strong_wind CSVs (registry=29, source_matrix=29, benchmark=30, canonical crosswalk=13, canonical intensity=29, v2 crosswalk=8, v2 intensity=30 = 15 x 2 pathways) and the corresponding JSON array lengths.
